name: Vichada (Colombia)

colors.symbolism: the savannahs and the wealth of the eastern plains
the gallery forests and the Orinoco river basin

description: Two equal horizontal stripes, yellow over green.
history: Vichada became a department of Colombia in 1991. Its bicolour flag of yellow over green represents the open savannahs and the gallery forests of the eastern Orinoco plains.
